proof: function[T0: Group, T1: Group](x0: GroupHom[T0, T1], x1: Subgroup[T0]) { subgroup_maps_to_one_raw[T0, T1](x0.hom, x1) = normal_subgroup_maps_to_one[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[G, H](f, n)
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1 * x2.inverse ∈ x0 = normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[G](n, a, b)

goal: exists(k0: G) { quotient_over_mk(q.qrel, k0) = q and quotient_over_lift_to_at[G, H](f.hom, q) = f.hom(k0) }
normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, q) = quotient_over_lift_to[G, H](f.hom, q)
proof: function[T0: Group, T1: Group](x0: GroupHom[T0, T1], x1: QuotientOver[T0], x2: Subgroup[T0]) { quotient_over_lift_to[T0, T1](x0.hom, x1) = normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[T0, T1](x2, x0, x1) }[G, H](f, q, n)

goal: quotient_over_lift_to[G, H](f.hom, q) = quotient_over_lift_to_at[G, H](f.hom, q)
normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a)) = f.hom(a)
normal_subgroup_quotient_mul[G](n, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a), normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, b)) = normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a * b)

normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_mul[G](n, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a), normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, b))) = normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a * b))
normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a * b)) = f.hom(a * b)
normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_mul[G](n, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a), normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, b))) = f.hom(a) * f.hom(b)
normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a)) = f.hom(a)
normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, b)) = f.hom(b)
f.hom(a) * f.hom(b) = normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a)) * normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, b))

normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_mul[G](n, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a), normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, b))) = normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a)) * normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, b))
normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_one[G](n)) = normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, G.1))
normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, G.1)) = f.hom(G.1)

normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_inverse[G](n, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a))) = normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a.inverse))
normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a.inverse)) = f.hom(a.inverse)
normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_inverse[G](n, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a))) = f.hom(a).inverse
normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a)) = f.hom(a)
f.hom(a).inverse = normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a)).inverse

normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_inverse[G](n, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a))) = normal_subgroup_quotient_lift[G, H](n, f, normal_subgroup_quotient_project(n, a)).inverse
